situation.noActiveEvents: There are currently no active international events.
situation.pushReformsHint: Continue pushing domestic demand, industry, and external expansion to trigger reform milestones at levels 5/10.

settlement.title: Fiscal Settlement
settlement.readonlyHint: This phase is read-only, showing how this round's income flows back into consumer purchasing power, factories, and government finance.
settlement.domesticSalesHint: Domestic market sales revenue for this round.
settlement.overseasSalesHint: Overseas market sales revenue for this round.
settlement.colonyIncomeHint: Additional income from controlled colonies in this fiscal settlement.
settlement.nationalIncomeHint: Total market sales revenue for this round.
settlement.nationalIncomeHintWithColony: Combined market sales and colony income.
settlement.cumulativeIncomeHint: Final core metric, including this round's settled income.
settlement.cumulativeIncomeHintFinal: After settlement, the final archive will be entered.
settlement.cumulativeIncomeHintNext: After settlement, the next round of national decisions will begin.
settlement.consumerPurchasingPowerHint: Forms next-round domestic purchasing power for market demand and pricing.
settlement.factoryBudgetHint: Flows back into factory budget pool.
settlement.governmentFiscalHint: Flows back into government fiscal budget pool.
settlement.consumptionPoolFormula: Previous balance {{prev}} fiscal + New allocation {{add}} fiscal = {{after}} fiscal, after 40% natural consumption remaining {{remainder}} fiscal
settlement.previousBalanceHint: Previous round consumer purchasing power balance.
settlement.newAllocationHint: Portion of this round's income allocated to consumer purchasing power at the current {{ratio}} ratio.
settlement.remainderHint: Final consumer purchasing power after natural consumption.

market.title: Market Sales Desk
market.noAllocationPriceNote: Only reference price shown when unallocated; actual transaction price recalculated based on allocation volume, price ceiling {{ceiling}}.
market.competitionCaptureNote: If capture succeeds: extra capacity +{{capacity}}, price +{{price}}{{estimated}}{{minPower}}

military.title: Military Fortress
military.fleetRuleNote: Deployable Fleets = Existing + Selected to Build - Deployed on Map; Sea zone control requires meeting threshold and leading in count. Colony control does not provide fleets, only affects market access, income, and ranking.
military.colonizationDesc: Pay {{cost}} government fiscal to permanently unlock colonization. After unlock, colonization only costs {{pointCost}} military points.
military.diplomacyBenefit: After establishing relations, the region's overseas market unlocks, allowing goods sales.
military.colonizationBenefit: After colonization, gain {{income}} national income per round.
military.conquestBenefit: After conquest, gain control of this region (national income per round) and ability to loot its resources.
military.independenceHint: Supply-demand imbalance increases independence tendency; garrison offsets it; looting adds +2.
military.overseasRegionStatusDesc: Shows which regions are currently open and which still require military points or diplomatic relations.
military.navalBuildingDesc: Expand your fleet to directly increase overseas capacity and power projection.
military.armyRecruitmentDesc: Replenish army and heavy weapons to enhance military influence.
military.diplomacyActionDesc: Permanently open regions through diplomacy, or use military actions to supplement this round's overseas projection and deterrence capabilities.
military.establishDiplomacyDesc: Permanently open trade routes. Costs {{cost}} government fiscal.
military.alreadyEstablished: This region already has diplomatic relations established; cannot resubmit this round.
military.plannedThisRound: Planned for diplomatic establishment this round.

research.notResearching: Click a technology on the right to select a research target. Research begins after submitting your decision.
research.progressFull: Progress full; each settlement will attempt breakthrough. Failure retains progress and continues next round.
research.autoConfirm: Active research is auto-confirmed for this step; you can submit the decision without changing the target.
research.breakthroughCheck: Current breakthrough check: 1D{{die}} roll {{threshold}} or higher succeeds
research.breakthroughSummary1: After progress reaches effective threshold, breakthrough is attempted during fiscal settlement
research.breakthroughSummary2: Dice result must be at least the effective threshold to unlock
research.breakthroughSummary3: Failure retains progress; each failure lowers next effective threshold by 1, minimum 1
research.breakthroughSummary4: If another country has already discovered this technology, reaching 2x the original threshold unlocks it directly
research.clickToResearch: Click unlock button to start researching
research.selectedAndSubmit: Selected; research begins after submitting decision

factory.title: Industrial Zone
factory.constructionLine: Production line, increases subsequent production capacity.
factory.productionDesc: Raw materials, factory budget, and capacity limit together constrain this round's output.
factory.productionRoutesHint: Prioritize allocating raw materials to unlocked routes with higher output ratios.
factory.capacityWarning: {{count}} raw materials will carry over to next round due to insufficient capacity.

domestic.title: Citizen Square
domestic.domesticEconomyDesc: These market values are already shown in Parliament Hall; Citizen Square only retains a read-only check before the sales phase.
domestic.governmentAdjustmentHint: Change this round's capacity, price, or overseas capacity via "Market Regulation" in Parliament Hall.
domestic.noMarketRegulation: No market regulation. The sales phase will use base supply/demand, existing events, and inherited effects for pricing.
domestic.priceNoteHint: Trade Port will recalculate transaction price based on actual allocation volume

government.title: Parliament Hall
government.marketRegulationDesc: Consumer purchasing power converts to this round's market regulation allowance, prioritized for subsidies, expos, import substitution, and public works.
government.marketBaselineDesc: After selecting strategies below, capacity, equilibrium reference price, and peacetime overseas sales capacity will update in real-time.
government.marketPriceHint: Trade details: capacity, price, and overseas sales will update per actual allocation at settlement.
government.sellPhaseNote: Sales phase will reprice based on actual allocation, base supply/demand, and existing effects.
government.ideologyHighestAlert: Any ideology reaching {{threshold}} enters highest alert phase; revolution mechanics not yet available.
government.atMaxStage: At maximum stage; subsequent revolution mechanics not yet available
government.reformPathNote: Admin remaining this round {{admin}} · Highest Alert {{threshold}}{{overflow}}
government.buyAdminDesc: Convert government fiscal to admin capacity this round, used to advance reforms or maintain policies.
government.reformAndPolicyDesc: Implementing reforms advances national identity along three paths; regular policies consume admin capacity and budget each round.
government.activePoliciesHint: Can be marked for deactivation this round; will take effect next round
government.activablePoliciesHint: Consume admin capacity and budget each round
government.buyMilitaryPointsDesc: Convert fiscal to military points for recruitment, fleet, and fortress actions after submission.
government.phaseHeaderDecisionDesc: Convert factory budget and government fiscal into production, market regulation, and national governance, while syncing domestic purchasing power.
government.phaseHeaderMarketDesc: Allocate inventory to domestic and overseas markets, directly generating this round's national income.
government.phaseHeaderSettlementDesc: The system will flow income back into consumer purchasing power, factories, and government finance according to the current allocation ratio, generating the next round's structural baseline.
government.syncingPhaseDesc: Syncing current phase data; you will be able to operate shortly.
government.policyEffectsDeferred: Effects start from next round's settlement; won't immediately add military action points this round.

submit.alreadySubmittedMsg: You have already submitted for this phase; wait for settlement.
submit.phaseMismatch: Current phase has changed; please refresh.
submit.gameNotFound: Game does not exist or has ended.
submit.notRoomMember: You are no longer in this room; cannot submit.
submit.invalidSession: Session expired; please log in again.
submit.recoveryNotAvailable: Cannot recover game state; please refresh.

flow.statusFinalResult: Final results generated, entering settlement page.
flow.statusRestoring: Restoring current round and phase, please wait.
flow.statusViewResults: This phase has completed settlement; please review results and wait for the next phase.
flow.statusWaitingSettlement: You have submitted; the system will settle once all players have completed.
flow.statusEditable: You can now fill in and submit this phase's operations.
flow.statusViewingSituation: Please review the current situation before deciding on this phase's operations.
flow.titleFinished: This game has ended; entering results page.
flow.titleFinishedDesc: Final results have been generated; you will be redirected to the results page shortly.
flow.titleSyncingDesc: Please wait; the system is restoring the current round, phase, and your actionable content.
flow.titleSettledDesc: Review the results below before preparing new arrangements for the current phase.
flow.titleAutoSubmitted: You missed the deadline; the system has submitted on your behalf
flow.titleAutoSubmittedDescPending: This phase has been auto-submitted per timeout rules; if other players have not yet submitted, waiting continues. Once all are done, the system will settle and display phase results before advancing.
flow.titleAutoSubmittedDescSettling: This phase has been auto-submitted per timeout rules; the system is now settling. After settlement, phase results will be displayed before advancing to the next phase.
flow.titleWaitingPlayers: You have submitted; waiting for other players to complete this phase
flow.titleWaitingPlayersDesc: You have completed this phase's submission. Waiting for {{count}} player(s) to submit; after settlement, phase results will be displayed before advancing to the next phase.
flow.titleSystemSettling: All players submitted; system is settling
flow.titleSystemSettlingDesc: All players have completed their operations; the system is aggregating this phase's results. After settlement, phase results will be displayed before advancing to the next phase.
flow.titleActionable: It's now your turn to complete {{phase}} arrangements
flow.titleActionableDesc: After confirming your phase operations are correct, you can submit. The system will settle once all players have completed.
flow.titleUnavailableDesc: Please review the phase objectives and result feedback, waiting for the system to sync to an actionable state.
flow.rhythmAllSubmitted: All players have completed their operations; the system is aggregating this phase's actions and preparing to advance.
flow.rhythmAutoSubmitted: Your phase has been locked and submitted by the system; all you can do now is wait for other players or system advancement.
flow.rhythmWaiting: Once all players submit, the system will automatically settle and advance to the next phase.
flow.rhythmSettled: First confirm what happened in the previous phase, then decide whether to adjust your operational strategy this round.
flow.rhythmActionable: After completing your arrangements on the left, confirm submission here; after submitting, you will enter the waiting-for-settlement state.
flow.validateWaitingSync: Waiting for current phase data sync.
flow.validateSettlementNoCheck: Fiscal settlement phase has no player hard constraints to confirm.
flow.validateNoBlocking: Current draft does not violate any hard constraints.
flow.validateFactoryOverBudget: Factory plan spending {{spend}} exceeds factory budget {{budget}}.
flow.validateDomesticOverBudget: Legacy domestic market action spending {{spend}} exceeds consumer purchasing power {{budget}}.
flow.validateGovernmentOverBudget: Government action spending {{spend}} exceeds government fiscal budget {{budget}}.
flow.validateBaseFiscalInsufficient: Base government fiscal insufficient: government/military/market regulation overflow requires {{required}}, but base fiscal is only {{available}}.
flow.validateRawMaterialOverAllocated: Raw material allocation {{assigned}} exceeds available raw materials {{available}}.
flow.validateLegacyBatchOverCapacity: {{label}} scheduled {{allocated}} batches exceeds this round's shared capacity {{available}}.
flow.validateMilitaryOverMaxPerRound: {{label}} scheduled {{count}} times exceeds this round's limit of {{max}}.
flow.validateDiplomacyEstablished: {{label}} already has diplomatic relations; cannot resubmit this round.
flow.validateDiplomacyDuplicate: {{label}} diplomacy action can only be submitted once per round.
flow.validateMarketDomesticOverDemand: Domestic sales {{allocated}} exceeds this round's demand {{demand}}.
flow.validateCompetitionDuplicateRegion: {{region}} can only submit one set of competition forces per round.
flow.validateCompetitionInvalidRegion: {{region}} is not a valid overseas region.
flow.submitTitleSettlement: No Player Submission in this Phase
flow.submitSettlementDesc: The fiscal settlement phase is automatically advanced by the system; no player submission required.
flow.submitAllReady: All critical steps are confirmed here for final verification.
flow.submitAlreadySubmitted: You have completed this phase's submission; waiting for system settlement.
flow.submitAutoSubmitted: You did not complete operations before the deadline; the system has auto-confirmed the current phase arrangements.
flow.submitFactorySpend: Factory estimated spend {{factory}}; Domestic estimated spend {{domestic}}; Government estimated spend {{government}}.
flow.submitMarketRevenue: Estimated domestic revenue {{domestic}}; Estimated overseas revenue {{overseas}}.
flow.submitAutoAdvance: The system will automatically advance to the next round of National Decision.
flow.resourcesContextWaiting: Waiting for current phase resource sync.
